plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-538 RP17.P06.M04.S24-RP17.P06.M06.S13 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-538 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP17.P06 workflow permission slice: the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice tail (the two remaining rows), the full M05 Permission And Audit Binding cycle (twenty-five rows), and the M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head (the first thirteen rows) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H17), Claude review packet (C17), and CP00-539 handoff, without opening AI governance, model policy, retrieval scope, or citation runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary:
CP00-538 is a descriptor-only closeout pack covering RP17.P06 workflow permission slice (M04 Secondary Workflow Slice tail 2 rows, M05 Permission And Audit Binding full 25 rows, M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head 13 rows = 40 units; range RP17.P06.M04.S24-RP17.P06.M06.S13). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level claim is fully supported and all boundaries hold.

Consistency: registry pack binding (registry.js:409), CP538 requirements (registry.js:2085), contract current_pack/cp538_requirements/cp538_no_write_attestation, the contract p06_workflow_permission_slice_descriptor projection (contract:23134), closeout-pack-plan pack (plan:407), README CP00-538 section, and manifest all agree on unit_count=40, risk_class=B, deliverable distribution {claude_review:3, implementation:18, security_audit:7, ui:7, test:4, hermes_evidence:1}, and micro-title distribution {Secondary Workflow Slice:2, Permission And Audit Binding:25, Synthetic Fixture Set:13}, matching the prompt baseline.

Implementation: all 7 required public exports are defined (create...Cp538P06WorkflowPermissionSliceCaseSet/Descriptor in service.js; validateCoverage, validateDescriptor, createHermesEvidencePacket, createClaudeReviewPacket, createCloseoutHandoff in validators.js) and re-exported via index.js export *. Every descriptor row is descriptor_only:true / runtime_execution:false / customer_safe_errors_only:true / raw_payload_included:false. No write/network/db/real-data patterns exist in packages/ai-governance/src (service.js imports only registry.js). freezeCp538Result attests no runtime dispatch, no permission evaluation, no audit writes, no state writes, no real fixture data, no leaks.

Validation: scripts/validate-rp17-ai-governance-core-contract.mjs performs deepEqual of the stored contract descriptor against the code-generated descriptor plus coverage/slice/hermes/claude/handoff assertions; command-evidence records rp17:ai-governance-core:validate, npm test, npm run validate, weighted/spec/fullplan/goal/control-plane validate, and git diff --check all exit 0. Tests (model.test.js:1628-1678) assert coverage, descriptor-only rows, authority boundary, no-write attestation, and evidence packets. Post-review gated commands (closeout-pack:validate, plan:generate, --cached diff) are correctly deferred per the hardened review sequence.

Boundaries: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor. Claude is a read-only reviewer (tools Read/Grep/Glob only), not final approver; authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true (CP00-539). Hermes pattern is used only as a deterministic descriptor evidence packet (H17.CP00-538...), not embedded in product runtime (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false). Review-hardening preconditions satisfied: auth preflight passed with non-zero valid-JSON stdout, no forbidden tools, source inspected via read tools (not summary-only). No P0-P3 findings; pack and goal closeout are not blocked.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-538 ai governance core p06 workflow permission slice descriptor pack
